subject: biology
title: 19M.3.SL.TZ2.15
question_html: Explain how food conversion ratios in livestock affect the amount of food for human consumption.
solution_html:
a. «food conversion ratio is» mass of animal food required to produce a certain product «in livestock» ✔

b. product may be consumable meat / milk / eggs ✔

c. some dietary choices are more sustainable than others
OR
maximum production of human food for little animal feed is desired ✔

d. some animals are more efficient at converting feed into useful product than others. ✔

e. amount of biomass lost affects this ratio ✔

f. some animal feeds will be better for producing useable products than others ✔

Accept examples for any of these marking points.
examiners_html: Candidates showed poor understanding of food conversion rates. There were a lot of irrelevant answers, but candidates often picked up some marks for mentioning energy losses and loss of biomass.
